error_signature: delayed conditional rendering with user variables
title: Delayed rendering of divs based on user variables
symptom: The incorrect div appears first before the correct one after a delay. This happens when using user variables for conditional rendering.
applies_when: Using user variables for conditional rendering
Page is loaded with user data
not_this_if: Using other types of variables for rendering
root_cause: The delay in rendering occurs because the user variables may not be fully populated or processed at the time the conditional rendering is evaluated, leading to a temporary display of the incorrect div.
fix_steps: Set the entire section to 'isAuthenticated' initially to prevent premature rendering.
Consider transferring user variables to normal variables during data fetching.
agent_instruction: Implement the workaround by setting the section to 'isAuthenticated' initially.
